segments.speaker: Marcus
segments.text: Main thing today — we still haven't picked the database for the new analytics service. We're three weeks from the Acme launch and this is blocking me.

segments.speaker: Priya
segments.text: Right. Last sync we were torn between Postgres and Mongo. Where did we land?

segments.speaker: Marcus
segments.text: I spent the week testing both. Postgres handles our query patterns way better. I want to commit to Postgres.

segments.speaker: Dana
segments.text: Any impact on the dashboard work? I don't want to redo the charts.

segments.speaker: Marcus
segments.text: No, the API stays the same. You're fine.

segments.speaker: Priya
segments.text: Okay, let's lock it — Postgres it is. Marcus, can you write up the migration plan? I'd like it by Friday so we're not scrambling.

segments.speaker: Marcus
segments.text: Friday's tight but doable. I'll have a draft.

segments.speaker: Priya
segments.text: And Dana, send me the final dashboard mockups by Wednesday?

segments.speaker: Priya
segments.text: Great. The Acme launch is the priority — everything else can slip.
